ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the transaction started */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the transaction ended */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Latency of the transaction in milliseconds */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration count of the transaction */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain where the transaction occurred */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address from which the transaction originated */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address to which the transaction was sent */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount transferred in the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Amount of gas used in the transaction */,
  "gas_price" REAL /* Price of gas at the time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Total fee paid for the transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number in which the transaction was included */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchains" (
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain */,
  "blockchain_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain */,
  "blockchain_type" TEXT /* Type of the blockchain (e.g., Ethereum, Bitcoin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blockchain */,
  "network_size" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the blockchain network */,
  "consensus_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for consensus (e.g., PoW, PoS) */,
  "current_block_height" INTEGER /* Current height of the blockchain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic record */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction being analyzed */,
  "average_latency" REAL /* Average latency of the transaction */,
  "max_latency" REAL /* Maximum latency of the transaction */,
  "min_latency" REAL /* Minimum latency of the transaction */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions in the analyzed period */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analysis */,
  "std_dev_latency" REAL /* Standard deviation of latency */,
  "median_latency" REAL /* Median latency of transactions */,
  "top_contributors" TEXT /* Top contributors to high latency (e.g., specific addresses or nodes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data (e.g., market data, regulatory updates) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the external data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the external data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the external data (e.g., economic, regulatory, technical) */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Score indicating the potential impact of the data on transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
